assessment: The Mobile-Friendly OpenSprint implementation fully meets the plan scope. All five phases use responsive layouts with ResizableSidebar overlays on mobile (<768px), touch targets meet 44×44px for primary actions, modals/dropdowns/toasts use viewport-safe positioning, and the Navbar has horizontal-scroll phase tabs with viewport-safe project selector. MOBILE_BREAKPOINT and TABLET_BREAKPOINT constants are in place; DependencyGraph uses ResizeObserver; kanban grids stack (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). All 1896 tests pass. Minor deviation: Playwright E2E was not added; Vitest viewport tests (375×667, 768×1024) cover critical flows instead.
